name: @borjie/document-quality-guarantor
description: Document quality guarantor — orchestrates multi-engine OCR intake, multi-engine output generation, blocking quality gates (confidence/schema/citation/roundtrip/visual-diff/font-embedding/accessibility), idempotent retry queue with DLQ, human-in-the-loop escalation to @borjie/workflow-engine, and a WORM-backed audit chain. The package the rest of the system trusts to never silently drop a document.
